ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genomic_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic entry */,
  "chromosome_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chromosome where the gene or transcript is located */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene associated with the entry */,
  "is_hgnc" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the gene is in the HGNC database */,
  "ensembl_gene_id" TEXT /* Ensembl gene identifier */,
  "transcript_id" TEXT /* Ensembl transcript identifier */,
  "biotype_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the biotype of the transcript */,
  "transcript_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the status of the transcript */,
  "ccds_id" TEXT /* CCDS (Consensus CDS) identifier */,
  "hgnc_id" TEXT /* HGNC (Hugo Gene Nomenclature Committee) identifier */,
  "entrez_id" TEXT /* Entrez gene identifier */,
  "cds_length" INTEGER /* Length of the coding sequence (CDS) */,
  "protein_length" INTEGER /* Length of the protein sequence */,
  "transcript_start" INTEGER /* Start position of the transcript on the chromosome */,
  "transcript_end" INTEGER /* End position of the transcript on the chromosome */,
  "strand" INTEGER /* Strand orientation (+1 for forward, -1 for reverse) */,
  "synonym" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of gene synonyms */,
  "rvis_pct" REAL /* RVIS (Residual Variation Intolerance Score) percentage */,
  "mam_phenotype_id" TEXT /* Mammalian phenotype identifier */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the genomic entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the entry */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the entry is active or deprecated */,
  "source_database" TEXT /* Name of the source database */,
  "source_version" TEXT /* Version of the source database */,
  "imported_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was imported from the source database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_entries_entrez_id FOREIGN KEY ("entrez_id") REFERENCES entrez ("entrez_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_entries_chromosome_id FOREIGN KEY ("chromosome_id") REFERENCES chromosomes ("chromosome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_entries_transcript_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("transcript_status_id") REFERENCES transcript_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_entries_mam_phenotype_id FOREIGN KEY ("mam_phenotype_id") REFERENCES mammalian_phenotypes ("phenotype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_entries_biotype_id FOREIGN KEY ("biotype_id") REFERENCES biotypes ("biotype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_entries_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_entries_hgnc_id FOREIGN KEY ("hgnc_id") REFERENCES hgnc ("hgnc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_entries_ccds_id FOREIGN KEY ("ccds_id") REFERENCES ccds ("ccds_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chromosomes" (
  "chromosome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chromosome */,
  "chromosome_name" TEXT /* Name of the chromosome (e.g., chr1, chr2, chrX) */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the chromosome in base pairs */,
  "is_sex_chromosome" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the chromosome is a sex chromosome */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the chromosome entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the chromosome entry */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the chromosome entry is active or deprecated */,
  "source_database" TEXT /* Name of the source database */,
  "source_version" TEXT /* Version of the source database */,
  "imported_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was imported from the source database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chromosome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" INTEGER /* Strand orientation (+1 for forward, -1 for reverse) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the gene entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the gene entry */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the gene entry is active or deprecated */,
  "source_database" TEXT /* Name of the source database */,
  "source_version" TEXT /* Version of the source database */,
  "imported_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was imported from the source database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biotypes" (
  "biotype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each biotype */,
  "biotype_name" TEXT /* Name of the biotype (e.g., snoRNA, lincRNA, protein_coding) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the biotype */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the biotype entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the biotype entry */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the biotype entry is active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("biotype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcript_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcript status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., KNOWN, NOVEL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the status entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the status entry */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the status entry is active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ccds" (
  "ccds_id" TEXT /* Unique CCDS identifier */,
  "ccds_name" TEXT /* Name of the CCDS */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the CCDS entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the CCDS entry */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the CCDS entry is active or deprecated */,
  "source_database" TEXT /* Name of the source database */,
  "source_version" TEXT /* Version of the source database */,
  "imported_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was imported from the source database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ccds_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hgnc" (
  "hgnc_id" TEXT /* Unique HGNC identifier */,
  "hgnc_name" TEXT /* Name of the HGNC entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the HGNC entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the HGNC entry */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the HGNC entry is active or deprecated */,
  "source_database" TEXT /* Name of the source database */,
  "source_version" TEXT /* Version of the source database */,
  "imported_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was imported from the source database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hgnc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entrez" (
  "entrez_id" TEXT /* Unique Entrez gene identifier */,
  "entrez_name" TEXT /* Name of the Entrez gene entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the Entrez entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the Entrez entry */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the Entrez entry is active or deprecated */,
  "source_database" TEXT /* Name of the source database */,
  "source_version" TEXT /* Version of the source database */,
  "imported_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was imported from the source database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entrez_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "synonyms" (
  "synonym_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each synonym */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene the synonym belongs to */,
  "synonym_name" TEXT /* Name of the synonym */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the synonym entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the synonym entry */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the synonym entry is active or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("synonym_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_synonyms_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mammalian_phenotypes" (
  "phenotype_id" TEXT /* Unique mammalian phenotype identifier */,
  "phenotype_name" TEXT /* Name of the mammalian phenotype */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the phenotype entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the phenotype entry */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the phenotype entry is active or deprecated */,
  "source_database" TEXT /* Name of the source database */,
  "source_version" TEXT /* Version of the source database */,
  "imported_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was imported from the source database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phenotype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active or disabled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
